scope.summary: Scope the served HTTP instance lock to the service state root and document the one-serve-per-state-root contract with an isolated-state recipe.
out_of_scope: Changing listener authentication, transport policy, or the separate state-root follow-up bead.

entry_points.name: serve --listen instance guard
entry_points.trace: acquire_service_instance_guard derives service-instance.json from FileStore::default_state_dir; service_instance_locks_are_scoped_to_each_state_root proves two distinct state roots acquire independent guards. README and operations document the same-state refusal and distinct-XDG_STATE_HOME listener recipe.

limitations: Manual review of committed source and its dedicated unit-test assertion. No source-exact clean-worktree test run was produced in this shared checkout; readiness therefore remains not-ready.
